message:
Add combined coverage report generation

- Create scripts/merge-coverage.ts to merge web and CLI coverage
- Add coverage:all and coverage:merge scripts to package.json
- Add lcov reporter to vitest.config.ts
- Update CI to generate and upload combined coverage report
- Close beads: 7vr6 (Bun test coverage), 06hp (combined coverage)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -50,6 +50,14 @@ jobs:
           name: coverage-cli
           path: coverage/cli/
           retention-days: 7
+      - name: Generate combined coverage report
+        run: bun run coverage:merge
+      - name: Upload combined coverage report
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: coverage-combined
+          path: coverage/combined/
+          retention-days: 7
 
   build:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest

@@ -20,6 +20,8 @@
     "test:e2e:web": "bunx playwright test --config e2e/playwright.config.ts",
     "test:e2e:web:ui": "bunx playwright test --config e2e/playwright.config.ts --ui",
     "test:coverage": "bun run --cwd apps/web test:coverage",
+    "coverage:all": "bun run test:coverage && bun run test:cli:coverage",
+    "coverage:merge": "bun run scripts/merge-coverage.ts",
     "jfp": "bun run jfp.ts",
     "build:cli": "./scripts/build-cli.sh",
     "build:releases": "./scripts/build-releases.sh",
